metadata.title:
JAKE" PIONEER PEDDLER


TO SEEK new FIELDS

pages.raw_text:
a very exciting existence amid the
great horde Of humanity which made
up the original army of trail blazers
of the west. Red shirts. bandanas.
six-shooters and gold dust galore are
now associated in his memories.


He crossed the plains in "a with
the original California stage stock.
He followed the rusn from California
to the Idaho placer excitement and
then returned to California. Here his
wife died. All of his five children are
dead. the last one, Jakey, having
met a violent death in Butte, where
he was shot by a notorious actress
Of the early days.


Jake's biggest stake" was made
in 80 during the first big rush to
the now famous Cariboo (B. CO.
placer excitement. He brought out
$4,000 in gold dust and nuggets.
